# Code of Conduct

The Nabi project adopts the [Rust Code of Conduct](https://www.rust-lang.org/policies/code-of-conduct).

All contributors, maintainers, and participants in Nabi community spaces are expected to follow this Code.

## Scope

This Code of Conduct applies to:

- The `nabisys/nabi` repository and any other repositories under the `nabisys` organization.
- Issues, pull requests, discussions, and other interactions in Nabi project spaces.

## Enforcement

Violations of this Code of Conduct in Nabi venues should be reported to the Nabi maintainer:

- Email: `contact@nabi.run`
- Subject line: `Nabi Code of Conduct report`

Reports can be made under a pseudonym. The maintainer will acknowledge reports within a reasonable timeframe and investigate them confidentially.

For violations occurring in shared Rust venues (the Rust Zulip, official Rust GitHub organizations, and forums under rust-lang.org), please refer to the [Rust moderation team](https://www.rust-lang.org/governance/teams/moderation) in addition to, or instead of, reporting to the Nabi maintainer.
